item.itunes:summary:
Telegram-Desktop
(Chat & Messenging)
i noticed the other unofficial version of telegram-deskop on this store was out of date
so i created this appimage for people
package created 02/09/2024
you will need qt6 installed

v1.01
updated appimage fixing issues with it not working


i am not the developer i am just creating an appimage

item.title: Memory Card Files Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Recovery Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Recovery Program
(Utilities)
Recovers lost data from memory card. Memory Card Files Recovery Program retrieves corrupted data from MMC micro card. Memory Card Files Recovery Program easily gets back entire deleted files saves in major extension like jpeg, gif, png, mp3, mp4, exe etc from damaged multimedia memory card.Memory Card Files Recovery Program is used to restore corrupted images, photo, audio, video, text document and other valuable data from virus infected micro-SD or mini-SD memory card. Memory Card Restoration Software rescues missing music or song from formatted or re-formatted smart media memory card in very few mouse clicks.

[read more]

Memory Card Restoration Software rescues missing music or song from formatted or re-formatted smart media memory card in very few mouse clicks.

Recovers lost data from memory card. Memory Card Files Recovery Program retrieves corrupted data from MMC micro card. Memory Card Files Recovery Program easily gets back entire deleted files saves in major extension like jpeg, gif, png, mp3, mp4, exe etc from damaged multimedia memory card.Memory Card Files Recovery Program is used to restore corrupted images, photo, audio, video, text document and other valuable data from virus infected micro-SD or mini-SD memory card. Memory Card Restoration Software rescues missing music or song from formatted or re-formatted smart media memory card in very few mouse clicks.

[read more]

item.title: TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: trustvare
item.itunes:summary:
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software makes converting HCL Notes (.nsf) to MS Outlook straightforward. The user interface guides you through all conversion stages. Move from Lotus Notes to Outlook fast by exporting any single item from your NSF file to an Outlook PST. Only some Lotus Notes mailbox objects can be exported.
The software scans Lotus Notes email databases, extracts all the components indicated above, and stores them in a new PST file at a user-defined location. It also recreates emails from NSF files. The program supports versions 12.0, 11.0, 10.0.1, 9 or 8.5, 8.0, 7 through 6, such as 6.5 alongside 6, making it one of the most compatible, while Outlook supports 2021: 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, 2003, 2002 (XP), and 2000. It also supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, 2003, and 2000.

Select and save only the necessary bits from a large list of convertible email items using this risk-free solution to convert NSF to PST. Expanding the converted stuff tree lets you save only what you need. Converted emails can be saved as a new PST or attached to an existing one. With these features, this software lets users preview converted mailbox items. In a three-pane window, you can evaluate emails, contact lists, attachments, tasks, diaries, and other NSF file components to convert them selectively.
[read more]
item.description:
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software makes converting HCL Notes (.nsf) to MS Outlook straightforward. The user interface guides you through all conversion stages. Move from Lotus Notes to Outlook fast by exporting any single item from your NSF file to an Outlook PST. Only some Lotus Notes mailbox objects can be exported.
The software scans Lotus Notes email databases, extracts all the components indicated above, and stores them in a new PST file at a user-defined location. It also recreates emails from NSF files. The program supports versions 12.0, 11.0, 10.0.1, 9 or 8.5, 8.0, 7 through 6, such as 6.5 alongside 6, making it one of the most compatible, while Outlook supports 2021: 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, 2003, 2002 (XP), and 2000. It also supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, 2003, and 2000.

Select and save only the necessary bits from a large list of convertible email items using this risk-free solution to convert NSF to PST. Expanding the converted stuff tree lets you save only what you need. Converted emails can be saved as a new PST or attached to an existing one. With these features, this software lets users preview converted mailbox items. In a three-pane window, you can evaluate emails, contact lists, attachments, tasks, diaries, and other NSF file components to convert them selectively.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software
(Utilities)
TrustVare NSF to PST Converter Software makes converting HCL Notes (.nsf) to MS Outlook straightforward. The user interface guides you through all conversion stages. Move from Lotus Notes to Outlook fast by exporting any single item from your NSF file to an Outlook PST. Only some Lotus Notes mailbox objects can be exported.
The software scans Lotus Notes email databases, extracts all the components indicated above, and stores them in a new PST file at a user-defined location. It also recreates emails from NSF files. The program supports versions 12.0, 11.0, 10.0.1, 9 or 8.5, 8.0, 7 through 6, such as 6.5 alongside 6, making it one of the most compatible, while Outlook supports 2021: 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, 2003, 2002 (XP), and 2000. It also supports Windows 11, 10, 8.1, 8, 7, Vista, XP, 2003, and 2000.

Select and save only the necessary bits from a large list of convertible email items using this risk-free solution to convert NSF to PST. Expanding the converted stuff tree lets you save only what you need. Converted emails can be saved as a new PST or attached to an existing one. With these features, this software lets users preview converted mailbox items. In a three-pane window, you can evaluate emails, contact lists, attachments, tasks, diaries, and other NSF file components to convert them selectively.

Android Mobile Pictures Recovery utility to restore missing official documents.www.cellpdasim.com provides efficient quality Android Mobile Pictures Recovery application to recover lost files from accidentally damaged android technology-based storage device .Affordable and secure Android Mobile Pictures Recovery software download from company website www.cellpdasim.com to recover deleted or missing files lost due to virus attack, improper device handling, logical error, human fault, software malfunction or any other data loss reason.

item.title: SIM Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Card Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Card Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Software rescues deleted contact numbers. SIM Card Data Recovery Software revives lost text messages saved in sim memory. Economically feasible SIM Card Data Recovery Software is available at company website www.cellpdasim.com is used to get back removed messages including inbox/outbox, drafts and sent items within shortest time of period from sim card memory. Technically sound SIM Card Data Recovery Software from www.cellpdasim.com allows you to recover lost data from sim cards after major data deletion situation without being requiring professional knowledge. Dynamic sim card data retrieval program facilitates you to restore deleted items even if sim card is not accessible.Are you looking for sim card data retrieval application? Browse company website www.cellpdasim.com to download cost effective SIM Card Data Recovery Software that helps you to rescue deleted or lost data including mobile phone book contact numbers, text messages, drafts, sent items and other important data saved in sim cards memory. Versatile sim card data undelete application easily retrieves squashed out data even if sim card is being blocked. Software allow user to extract sim card ICC identification number, service provider name and mobile IMEI number in an easiest manner.

[read more]

item.itunes:author: mobiledatarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Cell Phone Data Recovery tool regain lost jpg. Cell Phone Data Recovery program swiftly restores each corrupted multimedia file. Cell Phone Data Recovery software has no side effect on previously stored original records since utility is readable only. Cell Phone Data Recovery application maintains integrated advanced phone memory seeking mechanism to obtain each mislaid file. Deleted data recovery utility for mobile phone exploits some standard searching algorithms to restore totally ruined multimedia records. Cell Phone Data Recovery software revives fully misplaced mp3 or mp4 clips and marvelous photos in uncomplicated strategy after attaching with your personal computer. Remarkable data retrieval application for mobile phone salvages virus infected videos or text files in negligible efforts and graceful technique.
